case_title: REDWOOD CREDIT UNION VS. DARON TYSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100002357) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-23-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100000386) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100002357) AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON $5,322.72 PRINCIPAL, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $808.68 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,306.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100002357)
DECLARATION RE ATTORNEY FEES AND CALCULATION OF INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100002357) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $180.16 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100007236) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-2016
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100000699), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION SERVED JUL-07-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-23-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-23-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-24-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $753.17 AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON
